nasb.text: Whether it is pleasant or unpleasant, we will listen to the voice of the Lord our God to whom we are sending you, so that it may go well with us when we listen to the voice of the Lord our God.”

esv.text: Whether it is good or bad, we will obey the voice of the Lord our God to whom we are sending you, that it may be well with us when we obey the voice of the Lord our God.”

cnv.text: 不論是甜是苦，我們都願聽從耶和華我們　神的話，因為是我們委派你向他祈求的；我們聽從耶和華我們　神的話，就必凡事亨通。”

ccb.text: 不论我们的上帝耶和华说什么，我们都愿意听从。我们若听祂的话，就必亨通。”
